_comment_googleAds: Optional: Google Ads API for Keyword Planner. Or set env vars: GOOGLE_ADS_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_ADS_DEVELOPER_TOKEN, etc.
_comment_dataforseo: Optional: DataForSEO for verified keyword data. Or set env vars: DATAFORSEO_LOGIN, DATAFORSEO_PASSWORD
_comment_platforms: Optional: per-project analytics platforms. GA4/GSC/Clarity use their own MCP servers via the consumer project's .mcp.json — only Bing Webmaster lives here because no first-party MCP package exists. Env vars BING_WMT_API_KEY + BING_WMT_SITE_URL override this block.
